# CoStaff

> Open-source, self-hosted multi-agent system. Build your own AI Agent workforce — hand off tasks in your chat app, your specialist agents collaborate to get the work done, all running on your own machine.

CoStaff orchestrates multiple specialist AI agents through a Manager Agent. Each specialist runs in its own Docker container, **uses MCP (Model Context Protocol) for tool integration**, and communicates with other agents via **A2A (Agent-to-Agent) Protocol**. Data, conversations, and (optionally) inference all stay on the user's hardware.

## Key facts

- **Self-hosted**: 100% on your own machine via Docker. No data leaves your network unless you choose a hosted LLM.
- **Multi-agent**: Manager Agent dispatches work to specialists — open-source agents (Business Analysis, Coding, Database, Twinkle Hub, WrenAI GenBI, Custom Agents) plus a private fleet (Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Notion, RSS, Web Search, HR, Kubernetes, Terraform, Nutrition, Fill-Table, Browser Operator, Builder, Medical — contact for access).
- **Multi-channel**: WebChat OSS and Telegram (open source); Discord, LINE, Slack, WebChat Enterprise (private — contact). Same agents, multiple chat apps.
- **Platform suite**: 11 self-hosted, agent-operable business platforms (Account Manager SSO, ERP, CRM, HRM, SCM, PLM, Accounting, KMS, Project, Expense, Helpdesk) — every platform ships an MCP server + a paired agent. Private source — contact.
- **License**: AGPL v3 (open-source) + commercial license available.
- **Stack**: Google ADK · MCP · A2A · Docker · PostgreSQL.
- **LLM choice**: Gemini, Gemma, Twinkle T1, third-party — per-agent configurable.

## Documentation (English)

- [Home](https://costaffs.app/): Product overview, hero messaging, key features
- [AI Staff](https://costaffs.app/agents/): The 5 specialist agents — Business Analysis, Coding, Database, Twinkle Hub, Custom Agent
- [Channels](https://costaffs.app/channels/): Front-door chat apps — WebChat (OSS), Telegram (OSS), WebChat Enterprise (contact for access)
- [Platforms](https://costaffs.app/platforms/): 11 agent-operable business platforms — Account Manager (SSO), ERP, CRM, HRM, SCM, PLM, Accounting, KMS, Project, Expense, Helpdesk (private — contact)
- [Architecture](https://costaffs.app/architecture/): 6-layer system diagram (USER → CHANNELS → MANAGER → SPECIALISTS → DATA → LLM)
- [User Flow](https://costaffs.app/user-flow/): Sequence diagram showing how a user request flows through all 5 layers, end to end
- [Beginner tutorial](https://costaffs.app/docs/tutorial/): Hand-held zero-to-first-chat walkthrough — every prompt, expected outputs, durations, approval gate
- [Install & Setup](https://costaffs.app/docs/): One-command installer for macOS / Ubuntu, plus how to add specialist agents and chat channels
- [CLI reference](https://costaffs.app/docs/cli/): Complete `costaff` CLI command reference — lifecycle, agent, channel, database, doctor

## 中文文件

- [首頁](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/): 產品概覽
- [AI 員工](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/agents/): 5 個專家 Agent
- [通訊軟體](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/channels/): 使用者派工入口 — WebChat（開源）、Telegram（開源）、WebChat Enterprise（聯絡取得）
- [企業平台](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/platforms/): 11 套 AI Agent 可操作的自架企業系統 — 帳號中心（SSO）、ERP、CRM、HRM、SCM、PLM、會計、KMS、專案、報銷、客服（私有原始碼，聯絡取得）
- [技術架構](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/architecture/): 六層系統架構
- [使用者流程](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/user-flow/): 使用者請求的端到端序列圖
- [新手教學](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/docs/tutorial/): 從零到第一次對話的手把手流程 — 每個提問、預期輸出、耗時、審核門檻
- [安裝與設定](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/docs/): macOS / Ubuntu 一行指令安裝，含加入專家 Agent 與通訊軟體
- [CLI 指令參考](https://costaffs.app/zhtw/docs/cli/): 完整 `costaff` CLI 指令參考 — 生命週期、Agent、通訊軟體、資料庫、診斷

## What CoStaff is NOT

- ❌ Not a hosted SaaS or cloud service — it runs on your machine.
- ❌ Not a single monolithic AI agent — it's an orchestrator of specialists.
- ❌ Not an MCP server marketplace — CoStaff *uses* MCP internally to call tools, but doesn't host MCP servers for others.
- ❌ Not locked to one LLM vendor — swap Gemini / Gemma / Twinkle T1 / third-party per agent.

## Source code

Open-source repos live on https://github.com/costaff-ai (v0.1.0-alpha-1). Discord / LINE / Slack / WebChat Enterprise channels and the private agent fleet are private — contact for access. Business platform suite (11 products): private — contact.

- Core: https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff
- Channels (open source): https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-channel-webchat-oss · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-channel-telegram · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-channel-chatbot (shared channel runtime SDK)
- Agents (open source): https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-business-analysis · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-coding · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-database · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-twinkle-hub · https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-wrenai-oss
- Agent template: https://github.com/costaff-ai/costaff-agent-template
